member.name: T:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet
member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.name: T:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet.ItemTblDataTable
member.summary: Represents the strongly named DataTable class.

member.name: T:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet.ItemTblRow
member.summary: Represents strongly named DataRow class.

member.name: T:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet.ItemTblRowChangeEvent
member.summary: Row event argument class

member.name: T:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSetTableAdapters.ItemTblTableAdapter
member.summary: Represents the connection and commands used to retrieve and save data.

member.name: T:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager
member.summary: TableAdapterManager is used to coordinate TableAdapters in the dataset to enable Hierarchical Update scenarios

member.name: M:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateUpdatedRows(It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Update rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateInsertedRows(It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Insert rows in top-down order.

member.name: M:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateDeletedRows(It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Delete rows in bottom-up order.

member.name: M:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.GetRealUpdatedRows(System.Data.DataRow[],System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Remove inserted rows that become updated rows after calling TableAdapter.Update(inserted rows) first

member.name: M:It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateAll(It_s_Coffee_Cabin.CafeVbDbDataSet)
member.summary: Update all changes to the dataset.

member.summary: Update Order Option

member.summary: Used to sort self-referenced table's rows
